cat >> memory/findings.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 2026-03-19 (TW=1353.32, ~flat)
RESULTS: 244043 Old City (0.15 top, +24.31 WIN held early); 668257 Naini (0.15#2, +18.42 WIN, variant matched); 144493=Costa Rica (-13.33); 50504 bank=Bank of America (had French banks, -17.05 - broaden to intl banks); 655411=US (0.07#5, -2.74); 757234 toddler rescue=Iranian Red Crescent (-16.03, MISSED dominant-story: airstrikes IN Iran -> Iranian org).
LESSON: ambiguous war-casualty/rescue Qs -> default to IRAN theater (dominant story). Broaden candidate pools (intl not just local).
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'217580','427993','974962'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:135])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
